name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG
description: sig-intelligence is a working group dedicated to incubating intelligent agent applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate intelligent operating systems, expedite the dissemination of AI technologies, and advance explorations in their applications.

name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 代码仓库列表
description: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 维护的 112 个代码仓库，涵盖 AI 与机器学习 领域

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG（Special Interest Group，特别兴趣小组）负责 sig-intelligence is a working group dedicated to incubating intelligent agent applications and toolchains, with a vision to integrate intelligent operating systems, expedite the dissemination of AI technologies, and advance explorations in their applications.。该 SIG 共有 72 名核心成员，维护 112 个代码仓库，属于 AI 与机器学习 领域。

mainEntity.name: 如何参与 openEuler sig-intelligence SIG？

acceptedAnswer.text: 参与 openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 的方式：1）向相关仓库（如 openeuler/witty、openeuler/witty-opencode、src-openeuler/witty-opencode）提交 Pull Request；2）订阅邮件列表 intelligence@openeuler.org；3）参加 SIG 定期工作会议，会议信息见 openEuler 官网活动日历。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 包含哪些代码仓库？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 共维护 112 个代码仓库，主要包括：openeuler/witty、openeuler/witty-opencode、src-openeuler/witty-opencode 等。完整列表见 https://www.openeuler.org/zh/sig/sig-intelligence。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 的 Maintainer 是谁？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-intelligence SIG 现有 7 名 Maintainer，包括：Zhengce Hu、Shoucheng He、Kaitian Du。Maintainer 负责代码最终审核与合并。
